business.title: Researcher Announces Space Telescope Findings Match Predictions of Space-Phase Theory: Reality is Explained and the Door to New Tech is opened.
business.description: The James Webb Space Telescope found unexpectedly chemically mature galaxies. Turns out those JWST results match predictions of the Space-Phase Theory. Students of physics can visit jamesebeecham.com and click the video that explains the six features of Space-Phase which allowed that match to take place.

ai.title: AI speaks every language
ai.description: India has a large AI talent pool, but only 56% of graduates are employable. Businesses need AI specialists, but only half of Indian knowledge workers have the necessary skills.
